message:
Use safe localStorage wrappers in settings + remove emoji PR convention (#4383)

Migrate GitHubTokenSection and ProfileSection to safe localStorage
utilities. Check return values on critical save/clear paths and log
warnings when persistence fails.

Also removes emoji prefix convention from CONTRIBUTING.md (not enforced
by CI).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -54,7 +54,6 @@ Starts backend on `:8080` and frontend on `:5174` with a mock `dev-user` account
 ## Commit Conventions
 
 - Sign all commits with DCO: `git commit -s`
-- Emoji prefix: `✨` feature | `🐛` bug fix | `📖` docs | `⚠️` breaking | `🌱` other
 
 ## Getting Help
